ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose when the plugin should automatically detect and apply language tags
ast.target: 选择插件应自动检测并应用语言标签的时机

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls manual processing (ribbon icon, command palette). "Entire vault" processes all markdown files; automatic triggers always process only the current note.
ast.target: 控制手动处理（功能区图标、命令面板）。“整个保险库”处理所有 Markdown 文件；自动触发器始终仅处理当前笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default confidence threshold for detectors that don't have their own threshold configured (0-100)
ast.target: 未配置自身阈值的检测器的默认置信度阈值（0-100）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum confidence required for this detector (0-100)
ast.target: 此检测器所需的最低置信度（0-100）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Track all language detection and application operations for undo functionality
ast.target: 跟踪所有语言检测和应用操作以支持撤销功能

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export history data as JSON (copy from dialog)
ast.target: 将历史记录数据导出为 JSON（从对话框复制）

ast.target: 从粘贴的 JSON 导入历史记录数据

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check history data integrity and repair if necessary

ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Jump to code block in file
ast.target: 跳转到文件中的代码块

ast.name: warn
ast.source: One of your code blocks includes unescaped HTML. This is a potentially serious security risk.
ast.target: 您的一个代码块包含未转义的 HTML。这是一个潜在的严重安全风险。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
============================
Hi, looks like you are running TensorFlow.js in Node.js. To speed things up dramatically, install our node backend, visit https://github.com/tensorflow/tfjs-node for more details. 
============================
ast.target:
============================
您好，看起来您正在 Node.js 中运行 TensorFlow.js。为了显著提升运行速度，请安装我们的 Node 后端，详情请访问 https://github.com/tensorflow/tfjs-node。
============================

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Keep intermediate tensors is ON. This will print the values of all intermediate tensors during model inference. Not all models support this mode. For details, check e2e/benchmarks/ model_config.js. This significantly impacts performance.
ast.target: 保留中间张量已开启。这将在模型推理期间打印所有中间张量的值。并非所有模型都支持此模式。详情请查看 e2e/benchmarks/ model_config.js。这会显著影响性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The graph has a tf.print() operation,usually used for debugging, which slows down performance.
ast.target: 该图包含一个 tf.print() 操作，通常用于调试，这会降低性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This model execution did not contain any nodes with control flow or dynamic output shapes. You can use model.execute() instead.
ast.target: 此模型执行不包含任何具有控制流或动态输出形状的节点。您可以改用 model.execute()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TensorFlow.js deprecation warnings have been disabled.
ast.target: TensorFlow.js 的弃用警告已被禁用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Debugging mode is ON. The output of every math call will be downloaded to CPU and checked for NaNs. This significantly impacts performance.
ast.target: 调试模式已开启。每次数学调用的输出都将下载到 CPU 并检查 NaN。这会显著影响性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: VSCode Language Detection model not available
ast.target: VSCode 语言检测模型不可用
